syntax_14206.creator: nlaocs
syntax_14206.title: Packet Based Yaw/Pitch Rotation
syntax_14206.description:
Allows you to change pitch and yaw without rolling back the player's view.
It is possible to get Pitch/Yaw, but there is no advantage to using this Expression.

**Requires ProtocolLib 4.8.0+**

en:
Allows you to change pitch and yaw without rolling back the player's view.
It is possible to get Pitch/Yaw, but there is no advantage to using this Expression.

**Requires ProtocolLib 4.8.0+**
